svg.text: Purples first, then top-down serpentine · 9 purple bits + 48 grid bits = 57 total
Scan Ctrl → Purple Left → Purple Top → Purple Right → Row 3 (R→L) → Row 2 (L→R) → Row 1 (R→L) → Row 0 (L→R) → Scan Ctrl
Bits 0–2: Purple Left · Bits 3–5: Purple Top · Bits 6–8: Purple Right · Bits 9–56: 12 cells × 4 nodes (G→B→R→T)
